title: Quarterly Physical Access List Review Exception Tracking

compliance.assurance_rationale: Auto-migrated from cat-22 markdown on Phase 1.3 run. Requires SME review to confirm clause accuracy, mode (satisfies vs detects-violation-of), and assurance level (contributing/partial/full).

spl:
index=grc sourcetype="grc:control_test" earliest=-120d
| where control_id IN ("PCI-9.2.4-PHYS-REVIEW","PCI-9.2.4")
| eval overdue=if(now()>due_date AND NOT match(test_status,"(?i)pass|complete"),1,0)
| stats latest(test_status) as status, latest(due_date) as due by owner
| where overdue=1 OR isnull(status)
| sort due
value: Tracks completion of quarterly access roster reviews for personnel with keys or badges to CDE facilities, tying physical security policy to measurable workflow deadlines.
implementation: (1) Create recurring GRC control with quarterly `due_date`. (2) Push completion events from ServiceNow attestation. (3) Escalate to facility security lead. (4) Export closed tests for PCI policy evidence (Req 12 linkage).
visualization: Table (overdue owners), timeline (due_date), single value (overdue count).
knownFalsePositives: Administrative tasks, scheduled jobs or platform updates can match this pattern — correlate with change management, maintenance windows and user role before raising severity.
